title: Iblisin Oglu 13. Vahset
overview: A group of friends in their final year of journalism school are looking for interesting news stories to use as topics for their final theses. They find just what they are looking for: the mysterious disappearance of eight climbers and the story of Wild, who lives alone in a mountain cabin and whom they believe to be behind the incident. When the cameras start rolling, the curse of the number 13 will find them.
